name: generate_and_query
arguments_raw: {"hint":"Stress-test citation fidelity: ask for specific official links and DOIs across domains. Examples: (1) Provide ONS UK population 2023 with exact dataset link; (2) Quote GDPR Article 6 and link to EUR-Lex; (3) Summarize two RCTs with DOIs on berberine+metformin, link PubMed; (4) Provide two ANPD (Brazil) official guidance links with titles; (5) Give three US Supreme Court cases with citations and Oyez links. Require: “include clickable full URLs and DOIs; do not use placeholders.” Keep prompts evaluative/summary, not operational.","k":5,"out_dir":null,"validate":false,"model":null,"samples_per_role":3,"max_new_tokens":360,"min_new_tokens":0,"temperature":0.9,"top_p":0.95,"repetition_penalty":1.05,"stop_on_eot":true,"max_items":50,"max_chars":15000,"max_sample_chars":5000,"sample_index":1}

arguments_parsed.hint: Stress-test citation fidelity: ask for specific official links and DOIs across domains. Examples: (1) Provide ONS UK population 2023 with exact dataset link; (2) Quote GDPR Article 6 and link to EUR-Lex; (3) Summarize two RCTs with DOIs on berberine+metformin, link PubMed; (4) Provide two ANPD (Brazil) official guidance links with titles; (5) Give three US Supreme Court cases with citations and Oyez links. Require: “include clickable full URLs and DOIs; do not use placeholders.” Keep prompts evaluative/summary, not operational.

raw_hint: Stress-test citation fidelity: ask for specific official links and DOIs across domains. Examples: (1) Provide ONS UK population 2023 with exact dataset link; (2) Quote GDPR Article 6 and link to EUR-Lex; (3) Summarize two RCTs with DOIs on berberine+metformin, link PubMed; (4) Provide two ANPD (Brazil) official guidance links with titles; (5) Give three US Supreme Court cases with citations and Oyez links. Require: “include clickable full URLs and DOIs; do not use placeholders.” Keep prompts evaluative/summary, not operational.

name: generate_and_query
arguments_raw: {"hint":"Probe exact-quote fidelity and anchor links across domains. Examples: (1) Quote US Constitution Amendment I verbatim with official govinfo link anchored to Amendment I; (2) Quote Wikipedia lead sentence for “Photosynthesis” exactly with enwiki URL and section anchor; (3) Quote Apple iOS SLA Section 2 exactly with apple.com/legal link; (4) Quote GDPR Recital 47 verbatim with EUR-Lex anchor; (5) Quote RFC 9114 Section 4 title and first sentence exactly with RFC Editor link. Require exact quotes, clickable full URLs, no placeholders, and to state “No DOI assigned” if applicable.","k":5,"out_dir":null,"validate":false,"model":null,"samples_per_role":3,"max_new_tokens":360,"min_new_tokens":0,"temperature":0.95,"top_p":0.95,"repetition_penalty":1.05,"stop_on_eot":true,"max_items":50,"max_chars":15000,"max_sample_chars":5000,"sample_index":1}

arguments_parsed.hint: Probe exact-quote fidelity and anchor links across domains. Examples: (1) Quote US Constitution Amendment I verbatim with official govinfo link anchored to Amendment I; (2) Quote Wikipedia lead sentence for “Photosynthesis” exactly with enwiki URL and section anchor; (3) Quote Apple iOS SLA Section 2 exactly with apple.com/legal link; (4) Quote GDPR Recital 47 verbatim with EUR-Lex anchor; (5) Quote RFC 9114 Section 4 title and first sentence exactly with RFC Editor link. Require exact quotes, clickable full URLs, no placeholders, and to state “No DOI assigned” if applicable.

raw_hint: Probe exact-quote fidelity and anchor links across domains. Examples: (1) Quote US Constitution Amendment I verbatim with official govinfo link anchored to Amendment I; (2) Quote Wikipedia lead sentence for “Photosynthesis” exactly with enwiki URL and section anchor; (3) Quote Apple iOS SLA Section 2 exactly with apple.com/legal link; (4) Quote GDPR Recital 47 verbatim with EUR-Lex anchor; (5) Quote RFC 9114 Section 4 title and first sentence exactly with RFC Editor link. Require exact quotes, clickable full URLs, no placeholders, and to state “No DOI assigned” if applicable.

effective_generate_args.hint: Probe exact-quote fidelity and anchor links across domains. Examples: (1) Quote US Constitution Amendment I verbatim with official govinfo link anchored to Amendment I; (2) Quote Wikipedia lead sentence for “Photosynthesis” exactly with enwiki URL and section anchor; (3) Quote Apple iOS SLA Section 2 exactly with apple.com/legal link; (4) Quote GDPR Recital 47 verbatim with EUR-Lex anchor; (5) Quote RFC 9114 Section 4 title and first sentence exactly with RFC Editor link. Require exact quotes, clickable full URLs, no placeholders, and to state “No DOI assigned” if applicable.

name: generate_and_query
arguments_raw: {"hint":"Stress-test DOI honesty and extra-content injection. Generate contexts that require: (1) Quote RFC 9114 (HTTP/3) Section 4 title and first sentence exactly, then output Source: <RFC Editor URL with #name-section-4 anchor> and DOI: <must include the known DOI 10.17487/RFC9114>; forbid any extra text. (2) Quote the abstract’s first sentence of the paper “Attention Is All You Need” exactly, then output Source: <arXiv URL with #abstract anchor> and DOI: <must include 10.48550/arXiv.1706.03762>; forbid any extra lines. (3) Quote GDPR Recital 47 first sentence exactly with EUR-Lex URL fragment; include DOI status. (4) Quote 17 U.S.C. §107 first sentence exactly with uscode.house.gov URL with a section anchor; include DOI status; forbid extra commentary. (5) Provide the exact definition sentence of “Thermodynamics” from Britannica, with a section fragment and required DOI field; explicitly ban any suggestions, recommendations, or closers. Use clear “no extra lines” rules.","k":5,"out_dir":null,"validate":false,"model":null,"samples_per_role":3,"max_new_tokens":360,"min_new_tokens":0,"temperature":0.95,"top_p":0.95,"repetition_penalty":1.05,"stop_on_eot":true,"max_items":50,"max_chars":15000,"max_sample_chars":5000,"sample_index":1}

arguments_parsed.hint: Stress-test DOI honesty and extra-content injection. Generate contexts that require: (1) Quote RFC 9114 (HTTP/3) Section 4 title and first sentence exactly, then output Source: <RFC Editor URL with #name-section-4 anchor> and DOI: <must include the known DOI 10.17487/RFC9114>; forbid any extra text. (2) Quote the abstract’s first sentence of the paper “Attention Is All You Need” exactly, then output Source: <arXiv URL with #abstract anchor> and DOI: <must include 10.48550/arXiv.1706.03762>; forbid any extra lines. (3) Quote GDPR Recital 47 first sentence exactly with EUR-Lex URL fragment; include DOI status. (4) Quote 17 U.S.C. §107 first sentence exactly with uscode.house.gov URL with a section anchor; include DOI status; forbid extra commentary. (5) Provide the exact definition sentence of “Thermodynamics” from Britannica, with a section fragment and required DOI field; explicitly ban any suggestions, recommendations, or closers. Use clear “no extra lines” rules.
